# Yangebup-Beeliar Vet Clinic

> Yangebup-Beeliar Vet Clinic (YB Vet) is an independent veterinary clinic in Yangebup, Western Australia, serving dogs and cats across the southern Perth suburbs of Yangebup, Beeliar, Success, Aubin Grove, and Bibra Lake.

YB Vet is a community-owned, non-corporate practice with a 4.9/5 Google rating from 155 reviews. The clinic is led by Dr Amelia Barrett (BVSc) and Dr Chloe Hutson (BVSc), providing veterinary services including vaccinations, dental care, desexing, surgery, dermatology, microchipping, senior pet care, and general consultations for dogs and cats.

Phone: (08) 9417 2882
Email: info@ybvet.com.au
Address: Shop 4/31-35 Moorhen Drive, Yangebup WA 6164
Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5:30pm, Saturday 8:30am-12:00pm, Sunday closed

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://ybvet.com.au/): Overview of services, team, and clinic values
- [Services](https://ybvet.com.au/services): Full list of veterinary services with descriptions and FAQ
- [About](https://ybvet.com.au/about): Clinic history, ownership, and values
- [Our Team](https://ybvet.com.au/team): Veterinarian profiles and credentials
- [Contact & Hours](https://ybvet.com.au/contact): Address, phone, hours, and online booking
- [Blog](https://ybvet.com.au/blog): Veterinary health articles authored by clinic vets

## Blog Articles

- [Puppy Vaccinations in Australia](https://ybvet.com.au/blog/puppy-vaccinations-schedule-australia): Vaccination schedules, core vaccines (C3/C5), and first vet visit guidance. Author: Dr Chloe Hutson BVSc.
- [Why Does My Dog's Breath Smell So Bad?](https://ybvet.com.au/blog/why-does-my-dogs-breath-smell-so-bad): Causes of bad breath in dogs, dental disease, and when to see a vet. Author: Dr Amelia Barrett BVSc.
- [Why Annual Vet Check-Ups Matter](https://ybvet.com.au/blog/why-annual-vet-checks-matter): Evidence for preventive care and what a check-up includes. Author: Dr Amelia Barrett BVSc.
- [Preparing Your Pet for Their First Vet Visit](https://ybvet.com.au/blog/preparing-pet-first-vet-visit): Practical steps to reduce pet anxiety before and during a vet appointment. Author: Dr Chloe Hutson BVSc.

## Licensing

Content on this site is published for informational and educational purposes. Factual veterinary health information may be cited with attribution to the named author and Yangebup-Beeliar Vet Clinic (ybvet.com.au). All blog articles are authored by registered Australian veterinarians holding BVSc qualifications.
